dialoguesToLoad.text: It looks like it's finally over...
I think I prefer our methods of hunting...
This is faster. I like this method.
Hold on, guys! Aren't we forgetting something?
Why are we helping the freaking Archadian army ? I mean, they literally threw us in jail yesterday!
Without them, we'd be much worse. If we secure their help, we'll have supplies.
Maybe we should have triggered the crystal in their base.
They would have been taken by surprise. That would have resulted in many deaths.
Yeah, well you can call that retribution for all the Occidens soldier they must have killed.
You think your side is innocent?
Guys. That's not what we're here for.
You are right, Zack. This is going nowhere. Let's return to the commander.
